summary_bullets: This is by far the best trend indicator ever created on Trading View.
It tells you exactly when the trend is up or when the trend is down.
I will teach you a very accurate trading strategy based on this indicator.
This indicator is a new version of super trend.
As you know, super trend is a famous trend indicator and many traders use super trend for trend identification.
But this new version of super trend is much better than the original one.
To add it to your chart here, you just need to click on indicators and search pivot points super trend.
This one which is an editor specs indicator and written by lonesome deu.
It is already a popular indicator on trading view and it is used by many traders.
All right, as you can see it is overlaid on the price chart.

extracted_rules: It tells you exactly when the trend is up or when the trend is down.
So this new super trend has the ability to stay consistent during pullbacks and we have changing in the indicator only when there is a really change in the trend.

For example, if you add the original super trend with the same settings of ATR period and ATR factor like this one, you can see that it will change during deeper pullbacks, which can be misleading when you're trading in practice.
So in case if you need them in your trading strategy, you can use them.

And here when you turn this on, levels of the price that can act as a potential support or resistance level will be added to the chart and you can use them for trade entry, stop-loss and setting your profit target.
When the super trend line goes above the price and the color becomes red, it shows that the price is in a downtrend.
And when the super trend line goes below the price and the color becomes green, it tells us that the price is in an uptrend.

For example, when super trend is red, we say the market is trending down and we should look for short position opportunities in the pullbacks which as I said we use another indicator or price action analysis for this purpose.
And on the other hand, when the super trend is green, we say the market is trending up and we should look for long position opportunities in the pullbacks.

But in this video I want to teach you a reversal trading strategy where we try to find starting of a new trend which is when the super trend line changes posession and color and we have a buy or sell signal from the super trend.
When super trend line goes above the price and becomes red and we get a sell signal.
And at the same time where the price made same level when we check RSI we can see that RSI made lower high.
Here you can see that we have a reversal signal from the super trend and if you pay attention you can see that at the same time the price is also closed below the low of the divergence pattern.

So the reversal is confirmed here and in practice we could enter a short position at this point with a stop loss above the previous swing high and for the profit target we close our position when the super trend line changes to green.
If you want to improve in trading, you need a trading journal.
But when we check RSI, we can see that RSI made higher low.
So the reversal signal here is confirmed and in practice we could enter a long position at this point with the stop loss below the previous swing low.
And for the profit target, we close our position when the super trend line changes color and becomes red.
In other words, when we have a sell signal.

By the help of this trading strategy, you can avoid many of the false signals and even when the market suddenly changes direction and goes against your position, most of the time helps you to close your position with no loss or a small amount of loss.
